debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ onto f ↔ range f = Univ V

proof:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    apply Set.ext
    intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro _; exact trivial
    · intro _; exact h y
  · intro h y
    rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
    exact (h y).mpr trivial

apply Iff.intro
